summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EduQuest educational platform with 3 major fixes. Backend API testing achieved 95% success rate. Frontend authentication issues prevent complete end-to-end testing.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated access
minor_issues.impact: Minor - still properly blocks unauthorized access

working_endpoints: Q&A functionality (MCQ, short answer, long answer, structured)

critical_issues.issue: Session not persisting after login - users redirected back to login page
critical_issues.symptoms: API requests getting net::ERR_ABORTED, can't access protected routes

critical_issues.issue: Cannot navigate to Chapter 14 content due to auth issues
critical_issues.symptoms: Direct URL navigation fails, session expires immediately

verified_ui_elements: Login page loads correctly with proper form fields
Admin panel structure exists (Videos, GIFs sections)
Login form accepts credentials and shows loading state

passed_tests: ✅ Admin login via API direct call
✅ Chapter 14 content API (11 sections, title: The Respiratory System)
✅ Q&A API endpoints (questions load, answers can be submitted)
✅ Media endpoints (8 GIFs seeded, explainers available)
✅ Frontend login page UI renders correctly

critical_fixes: Fix frontend authentication session persistence - users cannot stay logged in
Debug CORS/network issues causing API requests to abort from frontend
Ensure proper token storage and retrieval in AuthContext
Test end-to-end flow: login → navigate to Chapter 14 → verify content loads
verification_needed: Chapter 14 content displays with 3-4 figures inline
Modal functionality for section explainers (e.g., Breathing Cycle)
Q&A accordion functionality with form submissions
Admin panel GIF and Video management screens

success_percentage.overall: 60% (backend working well, frontend needs auth fixes)
